name: Taylor J.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

We at the Anderson Auto Group have been using Synup for almost 8 years and they provide a great service. We have 9 dealerships in our auto group and to be able to sync all of our listings is a great help, Also whenever there is a problem their customer service is always friendly and fast!‍

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

I cannot think of anything, the crew over at Synup always provides great service and they provide a top-notch wonderful product! Any inconvenience has always been very brief.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

We at the Anderson Auto Group have been using Synup for almost 8 years and they provide a great service. We have 9 dealerships in our auto group and to be able to sync all of our listings is a great help, Also whenever there is a problem their customer service is always friendly and fast!
